title: alangium alpinum
intro: Alangium alpinum, also known as Himalayan Alangium, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cornaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alangium alpinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, among others. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
